featured.title: Why South Asians Get Heart Disease Even Without Symptoms
featured.description: Dr. Mandal explores the hidden cardiovascular risks disproportionately affecting South Asians, revealing why traditional warning signs are often absent and what proactive steps women can take to protect their heart health.
